title: Astrakhan, Astrakhan Oblast — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Astrakhan, Astrakhan Oblast: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Astrakhan is a city in Astrakhan Oblast with a population of 530,000. A historic Volga delta city and Caspian port, famous for its Kremlin, caviar production, and unique lotus-filled delta ecosystem.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
